title: Disabled source from "Add file" on a board
excerpt:
Hello, 
Is it possible to disable some source from the “add files” on a board? 
  
Thanks for your help 
Regards, 
Théo

posts.author: donnet.t (Théo Donnet)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Is it possible to disable some source from the “add files” on a board?

image561×577 27.3 KB

Thanks for your help

Regards,
Théo

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Théo,

Welcome to the monday community!

Unfortunately I do not believe what you are asking for is possible.

Could you explain further why you want to disable some sources? Hopefully I can help you more then.

Cheers,
Giannis
Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: donnet.t (Théo Donnet)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Giannis,

thanks for your reply.

The reason behind my request is that files need to come only from corporate source.
User shouldn’t be allowed to connect their personnal cloud storage to upload a document.

Regards,
Théo

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
I understand.

I again looked into what you asked and regrettably I believe it is not currently possible.

I’d suggest noting your idea here , however if your issue must be resolved immediately unfortunately you should just instruct your users not to use their personal cloud.

I am sorry for not being able to help more, should I come across a possible solution I will contact you.

Cheers,
Giannis

posts.author: donnet.t (Théo Donnet)
posts.cookedHtml: Here’s th link to the suggest an idea section : Disabled source from “Add file” on a board
